meaning: adj.希腊的,希腊人的,希腊语的n.希腊人,希腊语
examples: He knew nothing of Greek drama.
He didn't speak anything but Greek.
A Greek oil tanker has run aground.
Meanwhile, winger Nabil El Zhar has joined Greek club PAOK on a season-long loan.
Ethnographers are entranced by a distinct dialect that continues to contain words from ancient Dorian Greek.
